join.title: Join a federated session
join.subtitle: Paste the invite token from the host organization to connect your team.
join.successBody: Your team has joined the federated session.
join.privacyNote: Only aggregate counts are shown. Qesto never reveals the identities of other organizations in a federated session.
error.invite_invalid: This invite link is invalid or has expired. Ask the host to send a new one.
error.forbidden: You must be a member of the team you're joining with.
error.already_member: Your team has already joined this session.
error.federation_disabled: Federation is not available right now. Please try again later.
error.kv_unavailable: Federation is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
error.not_found: We couldn't find that team or session.
error.generic: Something went wrong while joining. Please try again.
